title: Faculty of Health Sciences Vision & Mission
content:
Faculty of Health Sciences Vision & Mission

Our vision

To be a prestigious, pioneer and an innovative faculty in which specific and scientific studies are carried out, which is well-known in both national and international academic platforms, accepted by educational and instructional health sciences authorities in the world, and is an expert on making plans and policies of community health.

Our mission

To educate individuals who are able to perform interdisciplinary co-ordination and teamwork in healthcare field, to utilize science and technology to enhance health, progress and  life quality of the community, to have knowledge and skills in their own professions, and also those who are researchers, respectful to the universal , ethical and humanistic values.
